open_risks_summary: Zotero UI/import flows cannot be fully verified with Jest alone.
FTL .label attribute rendering requires manual Zotero 9 runtime verification.
MenuManager context.collectionTreeRow runtime type cast (any) needs Zotero 9 runtime validation.
patchMethod() restores originals but skips if target was externally modified; logs warning instead.
fetchDuplicates({ refresh: true }) does NOT trigger notifier events — cache invalidation is explicit in menuCache but needs runtime validation.
M009 two-level registration wrappers use dynamic imports that need Zotero runtime verification.
M009 notify handlers use module-level singletons (single-window assumption) — multi-window scenarios untested.
ChromeUtils.importESModule type declaration returns any — future milestone may add narrower type.
jest.Mock<any> cast in merger.test.ts is a workaround for Jest 30 / ts-jest 29 type inference gaps.
Dead default export in menus.ts — hooks.ts uses named imports; cleanup deferred.
warmCache() relies on active pane for libraryID — safe for current call sites but fragile for background contexts.
isAlive() accessor uses optional chaining — silently returns false if addon global not assigned.
AppState.config uses inline type rather than typeof config from package.json — must stay in sync manually.
Zotero.Plugins.removeObserver was removed entirely from notifier.ts (lifecycle owned by DisposerRegistry in hooks.ts).
BulkDuplicates.isRunning setter still uses getActiveZoteroPane() for getSelectedLibraryID outside registerUIElements closure scope.
getMenuRegisteredIDs/setMenuRegisteredIDs in state.ts may be dead code after M006 menu disposer wiring — cleanup deferred.
Factory type signatures in hooks.ts must stay in sync with createBulkMergeButton and createNonDuplicateButton signatures.
onSyncDownload flag-based disposal leaves callback registered in Zotero memory (negligible for single listener per library).
refreshLocalFromSync resolves keys sequentially — could be slow for very large pair sets.
Pre-migration null keys in local DB will not be cleaned from SyncedSettings on item delete.
